query_normalized: exploring the convergence of iterated function systems with non-contractive maps mathematics
rationale: This paper studies Arnold circle maps and phase-locking phenomena in forced oscillators, which is a different mathematical construct from Iterated Function Systems (IFS) with non-contractive maps. While both fall under the broad umbrella of dynamical systems, they address distinct mechanisms (phase-locking/periodic attractors vs. fractal set convergence under non-contractive mappings) and do not satisfy any of the inclusion criteria (a-f) for literature review relevance.
